results.title: Shuka completed eighth drill hole in Zambia
results.description: Dual-listed Shuka Minerals has successfully completed the eighth drill hole, KBDD08, in the previously unmined Speaks and Mine Club zones at the Kabwe zinc mine, in Zambia. The company and its consultants GeoQuest planned these exploration holes to intersect a different, previously unexploited orebody in the Speaks and Mine Club areas about 1 km northwest from the Pit 2 area where it has been focussing its studies to date.

results.title: Xinhua Silk Road: Sub-venue of 16th China-Russia culture fair opens in Jiamusi, NE China's Heilongjiang Province
results.description: BEIJING, July 14, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- The sub-venue of the 16th China-Russia culture fair opened on July 10 in Jiamusi, northeast China's Heilongjiang Province. results.title: US Dollar: Tailwinds build as oil and Fed reprice – OCBC
results.description: OCBC strategists Sim Moh Siong and Christopher Wong note the US Dollar (USD) has strengthened broadly on higher Oil prices, hawkish Federal Reserve (Fed) rhetoric and softer risk sentiment.

results.title: 16.4% Surge: India's Tax Coffers Swell To Rs 6.51 Lakh Crore As Economic Momentum Builds
results.description: Net direct tax collections rose 16.4% year-on-year to Rs 6.51 lakh crore as of July 13, with gross collections climbing past Rs 7.73 lakh crore despite higher refunds.
